changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.song_artist ( song_id bigint not null, artist_id bigint not null, roles jsonb not null, constraint pk_song_artist primary key (song_id, artist_id), constraint fk_song_artist_song foreign key (song_id) references gmdb.song (id), constraint fk_song_artist_artist foreign key (artist_id) references gmdb.artist (id), constraint ck_song_artist_role check (roles is json array and not jsonb_path_exists(roles, '$[*] ? (@ == null)') and jsonb_array_length(roles) > 0) );
